en: I mean no immigrant food, nothing. No Mexican food, no Caribbean food,
ko: 멕시코 음식도 없고, 카리브 음식도 없고,

en: no Dominican food, no Asian food, nothing. Only potatoes.
ko: 도미니카 음식도 없고, 아시아 음식도 없어, 아무것도 없어.

en: And I'm not even saying like flavored potatoes, I'm just saying plain potatoes, no spice.
Because no immigrants, no spice. Don't ever forget that.
Both figuratively and literally, no spice.
And I know some people would take that, I know, I know. I know there's some people right now who'd be like,
ko: 어떤 사람들은 그걸 받아들일 거라는 걸 알아, 알아.

en: well, you know what, Trevor, take your immigrants, take your spice and get the hell out of here.
ko: 지금 당장 "트레버, 이민자와 양념 다 가져가!"라고 할 사람들도 있을 거야.

en: Eh, you say that now. Because you've never lived a life without spice.
But don't ever forget, a life without spice was so hard,
ko: 하지만 절대 잊지 마, 양념 없는 삶은 너무 힘들었어,

en: so hard, that it made white people sail around the world to find it.
